vocab.meaning: có một khoảng thời gian cực kỳ vui vẻ
vocab.example: I remember having a whale of a time playing car games with my sister during those long summer trips.

vocab.meaning: làm ai đó phát điên/bực mình
vocab.example: My constant asking of 'Are we there yet?' used to drive my father up the wall.
To me, those weekend car rides were a chance to recharge my batteries after a busy week at primary school.

vocab.word: get the show on the road
vocab.meaning: bắt đầu một chuyến đi hoặc hoạt động
vocab.example: We used to wake up at the crack of dawn, eager for my parents to finally get the show on the road.

vocab.meaning: ở thế chủ động/kiểm soát (nghĩa bóng)
vocab.example: Even as a kid, I loved sitting right behind the driver because I felt like I was almost in the driving seat myself.

vocab.meaning: quan sát thế giới trôi qua (một cách thong thả)
vocab.example: I was quite a quiet child, so I was perfectly happy to just sit by the window and watch the world go by.

vocab.meaning: trở về những ký ức trong quá khứ
vocab.example: Thinking about those old family road trips really takes me a trip down memory lane.
I used to get so frustrated when we were stuck in holiday traffic, moving at a snail's pace for hours.

vocab.meaning: đang mải mê suy nghĩ tận đâu đâu
vocab.example: During long car journeys, I would often be miles away, daydreaming about the adventures waiting for us.

vocab.meaning: khoảng thời gian tuyệt vời nhất đời
vocab.example: Visiting the beach by car every year was the highlight of my childhood; I truly had the time of my life.
